title: Resources for Small Businesses
text:
Mission
The Missile Defense Agency Small Business Advocacy Council (MDASBAC) is dedicated to fostering and showcasing a superior collaborative environment for Missile Defense Agency prime contractors that develop and promote successful small business relationships to achieve common goals.
Purpose
The MDASBAC seeks to strengthen alliance with MDA and large prime contractors to support the agency's mission and small business goals.
Participants
MDA Representative
Ms. Ashley Kennemer , (256) 450-4660
